ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the asset (e.g., Health and Safety Aids) */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset (e.g., Infrared Thermometer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the asset */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the asset */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period of the asset */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Recommended maintenance frequency */,
  "unit_cost" TEXT /* Cost of each unit of the asset */,
  "last_inventory_check" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the asset (e.g., available, out of stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "district" TEXT /* District where the school is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "contact_person_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_person_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_person_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was established */,
  "student_population" INTEGER /* Current number of students */,
  "teachers_population" INTEGER /* Current number of teachers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school making the request */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being requested */,
  "quantity_required" INTEGER /* Total quantity of the asset required */,
  "remaining_quantity" INTEGER /* Remaining quantity of the asset */,
  "application_last_date" TEXT /* Last date for application submission */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the request */,
  "reason_for_request" TEXT /* Reason why the asset is being requested */,
  "estimated_cost" TEXT /* Estimated cost of the requested assets */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the request */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the request was approved */,
  "delivery_address" TEXT /* Delivery address for the assets */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the supplier */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax identification number of the supplier */,
  "bank_account_number" TEXT /* Bank account number for payments */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed upon with the supplier */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the supplier based on performance */,
  "last_rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the last rating update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request being contributed to */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier making the contribution */,
  "quantity_contributed" INTEGER /* Quantity of the asset contributed */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was made */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the contribution */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date of the invoice */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Status of the delivery */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the assets were delivered */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procurement_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procurement official */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the procurement official */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the procurement official */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the procurement official */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the procurement official */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the official belongs to */,
  "office_address" TEXT /* Office address of the official */,
  "office_phone" TEXT /* Office phone number of the official */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in procurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procurement_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request being updated */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the procurement official updating the status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the procurement process */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes related to the status update */,
  "next_steps" TEXT /* Next steps in the procurement process */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of completion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_status_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES procurement_officials ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_status_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., school administrator, procurement official, supplier) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, update, delete) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification" TEXT /* Description of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
